allow: PowerShell(docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config --quiet; if \($?\) { Write-Output "compose OK" }; Write-Output "--- tooling ---"; $mvn = \(Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($mvn\) { mvn -v } else { Write-Output "mvn NO disponible" }; $java = \(Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($java\) { java -version } else { Write-Output "java NO disponible" })
